---
name: Analysis task
about: Manual annotation, statistical breakdown, or qualitative study on existing results
title: "[Analysis] "
labels: ["type:analysis"]
---

## Goal
What insight or artifact does this analysis produce for the paper?

## Inputs
- Source data: `results/...`
- Predecessor task: #

## Method
Describe the analysis procedure (manual labeling rules, statistical test, sampling protocol, etc.).

## Output
- File: `results/...` or `notebooks/...`
- Paper section it feeds: §X.X

## Definition of done
- [ ] Output file committed
- [ ] Findings summarized in `log.md` or paper draft
